_fixture_meta.label: positive
_fixture_meta.notes: D02 Signal B: locker expiry within 48 hours reduces effective_safe_pct below threshold. LP tokens locked via Streamflow locker, expiry in 36h. Currently effective_safe=62% but locker_expiry_hours=36 triggers near-expiry penalty. Tests that time-to-unlock is factored into D02 confidence.

d01_honeypot.reason: No static honeypot signals. No freeze_authority, no transfer_fee, no permanent_delegate, no transfer_hook.

d02_rug_pull.reason: Signal B: effective_safe_pct=62%. Normally this would produce conf=0.50+(1-0.62)*0.5=0.69 Medium. Near-expiry penalty: locker_expiry_hours=36<48 applies; treat locked portion as at-risk for near-term withdrawal. Adjusted effective_safe treated as 0 for forward-looking risk: conf=min(0.75, 0.50+(1.0-0.0)*0.5)=0.75 Medium-High. Single LP provider: no bonus applied (bonus only for fully-locked configs). Output: 0.65-0.75 High boundary. Flag: spec does not explicitly define the near-expiry downgrade formula — calibration needed.
d02_rug_pull.calibration_note: The near-expiry locker treatment is not in the current D02 spec. The fixture tests a design gap: locker_expiry_hours should factor into effective_safe_pct downgrade. Sprint 5: add locker_expiry_hours parameter to D02 confidence formula. Until then, report at pre-expiry effective_safe (62%) giving conf=0.69 Medium.

d03_concentration.reason: top10_now=(95+62+41+28+19)e12/1e15=0.245. prior=0.29. Delta=-0.045 (decrease). Signal 3: 0.245<0.80. No concentration signal.

d04_pump_dump.reason: vol_multiplier=0.82 < 5.0. price_change=+2.2% < 30%. D04 Signal A does not fire. Signal B: vol_1h=18k, vol_24h required but burst_ratio < 0.90. D04 BELOW.

d06_mint_burn_anomaly.reason: mint_authority=null. No mint/burn events. D06 does not fire.
